item.title: 🎉 Paper accepted at the AI4Space Workshop (CVPR 2026).
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: Pixel-to-4D: Camera-Controlled Image-to-Video Generation with Dynamic 3D Gaussians
🎉 Paper accepted at ICPR 2026.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: Neural 3D Reconstruction of Planetary Surfaces from Descent-Phase Wide-Angle Imagery
🎉 Paper accepted at WCCI 2026.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: Sampling 3D Gaussian Scenes in Seconds with Latent Diffusion Models
Marcelle B. M. Spera
item.description: Research associate on the MicroSep project since September 2025.

item.title: Sasha (Aleksandra) Ardaševa
item.description: Research associate on the MIAM-CO2 project since May 2025.

Preferred method

Molecular simulations, particulalry when it can be compared to experiments like neutrons or NMR.

item.title: Pablo Grisanti
item.description: PhD candidate at LIPhy, Université Grenoble Alpes, since April 2024.

item.title: 🎓 Started PhD at the University of Glasgow.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: Identifying Legal party Members from Legal Opinion Text using Natural Language Processing
item.description: The 23rd International Conference on Information Integration and Web Intelligence

<!-- --- date: 2025-01-02 publishDate: 2025-01-02 external_link: "https://github.com/simongravelle" image: caption: Fluid transport through polymers focal_point: Smart slides: summary: tags: title: --- ## Systems that interest me - Soft matter systems, such as polymers and proteins - Fluids in confined environments or near interfaces -->
